siteInfo.name: RSM
siteInfo.description: Multimedia platform exploring mysteries, current events, and untold stories

en.title: The Pyramids of Egypt: The Engineering Mystery
en.excerpt: The pyramids of Egypt represent one of the greatest anomalies in human history...
en.content:
The pyramids of Egypt, particularly the Great Pyramid of Giza, represent one of the greatest engineering mysteries of all time. Built over 4500 years ago, these structures continue to amaze modern engineers with their mathematical precision.

How did ancient Egyptians cut, transport, and place blocks weighing over 80 tons? This remains an unsolved mystery that challenges official history.

ur.title: مصر کے اہرام: انجینئرنگ کا معمہ
ur.excerpt: مصر کے اہرام انسانی تاریخ کے سب سے بڑے معمہ ہیں...
ur.content: مصر کے اہرام، خاص طور پر جیزہ کا عظیم ہرم، تاریخ کے سب سے بڑے انجینئرنگ معمہ ہیں۔ 4500 سال پہلے تعمیر کیے گئے، یہ ڈھانچے آج بھی جدید انجینئرز کو حیران کرتے ہیں۔

ur-roman.title: Misr ke Ahraam: Engineering ka Mamya
ur-roman.excerpt: Misr ke ahraam insani tareekh ke sab se baray mamya hain...
ur-roman.content: Misr ke ahraam, khas tor par Giza ka azeem haram, tareekh ke sab se baray engineering mamya hain. 4500 saal pehle tameer kiye gaye, ye dhanchay aaj bhi jadeed engineers ko hairan karte hain.

en.title: Vajont: The Announced Tragedy
en.excerpt: On October 9, 1963, a landslide of 260 million cubic meters fell into the Vajont reservoir...
en.content: The Vajont disaster, which occurred on October 9, 1963, is considered one of the greatest preventable tragedies in Italian history. A landslide of 260 million cubic meters fell into the artificial lake, generating a 250-meter wave that destroyed downstream villages, causing nearly 2000 victims.

ur.title: واجونٹ: اعلان شدہ المیہ
ur.excerpt: 9 اکتوبر 1963 کو 260 ملین کیوبک میٹر مٹی کا تودہ واجونٹ جھیل میں گر گیا...
ur.content: واجونٹ تباہی، جو 9 اکتوبر 1963 کو پیش آئی، اطالوی تاریخ کے سب سے بڑے قابلِ روک تھام سانحات میں سے ایک ہے۔ 260 ملین کیوبک میٹر مٹی کا تودہ مصنوعی جھیل میں گر گیا، جس سے 250 میٹر کی لہر بنی جس نے نیچے کی وادیوں کے دیہات تباہ کر دیے، جس سے تقریباً 2000 افراد ہلاک ہوئے۔

ur-roman.title: Vajont: Elaan Shuda Almiya
ur-roman.excerpt: 9 October 1963 ko 260 million cubic meter mitti ka toda Vajont jheel mein gir gaya...
ur-roman.content: Vajont tabahi, jo 9 October 1963 ko pesh aayi, Italian tareekh ke sab se baray qabil-e-rok thaam sanhat mein se ek hai. 260 million cubic meter mitti ka toda masnoi jheel mein gir gaya, jis se 250 meter ki lehar bani jis ne neeche ki wadiyon ke dehaat tabah kar diye, jis se taqreeban 2000 afraad halaak hue.

en.title: MH370: The Unsolved Mystery
en.excerpt: On March 8, 2014, Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 disappeared from radar with 239 people on board...
en.content: On March 8, 2014, Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 disappeared from radar with 239 people on board, giving rise to one of the greatest mysteries in modern aviation. The aircraft, a Boeing 777, deviated from its planned route before vanishing completely.

ur.title: MH370: حل طلب معمہ
ur.excerpt: 8 مارچ 2014 کو ملائیشیا ایئر لائنز کی پرواز MH370 239 مسافروں کے ساتھ ریڈار سے غائب ہو گئی...
ur.content: 8 مارچ 2014 کو ملائیشیا ایئر لائنز کی پرواز MH370 239 مسافروں کے ساتھ ریڈار سے غائب ہو گئی، جو جدید ہوا بازی کے سب سے بڑے معمہ بن گئی۔

ur-roman.title: MH370: Hal Talab Mamya
ur-roman.excerpt: 8 March 2014 ko Malaysia Airlines ki flight MH370 239 musafiron ke sath radar se gayab ho gayi...
ur-roman.content: 8 March 2014 ko Malaysia Airlines ki flight MH370 239 musafiron ke sath radar se gayab ho gayi, jo jadeed hwa bazi ke sab se baray mamya ban gayi.

en.title: MH370: The Unsolved Mystery (Documentary)
en.excerpt: An in-depth documentary on the disappearance of Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370...
en.content: Watch this documentary exploring the theories behind the disappearance of MH370.

ur.title: MH370: حل طلب معمہ (دستاویزی فلم)
ur.excerpt: ملائیشیا ایئر لائنز کی پرواز MH370 کی گمشدگی پر گہرائی سے دستاویزی فلم...
ur.content: یہ دستاویزی فلم دیکھیں جو MH370 کی گمشدگی کے پیچھے نظریات کی کھوج کرتی ہے۔

ur-roman.title: MH370: Hal Talab Mamya (Documentary)
ur-roman.excerpt: Malaysia Airlines ki flight MH370 ki gumshudgi par gehrai se documentary...
ur-roman.content: Yeh documentary dekhein jo MH370 ki gumshudgi ke peeche nazriyat ki khoj karti hai.

en.title: Iran Appoints New Leader Amid Escalating Conflict
en.excerpt: In recent days, Iran has found itself at the center of a fierce conflict...
en.content: In recent days, Iran has found itself at the center of a fierce conflict following the start of a large-scale military operation. The country has announced the appointment of a new leader during this critical time.

ur.title: بڑھتے ہوئے تنازع کے درمیان ایران میں نئے رہنما کا تقرر
ur.excerpt: پچھلے کچھ دنوں میں ایران ایک شدید تنازع کے مرکز میں ہے...
ur.content: پچھلے کچھ دنوں میں ایران ایک شدید تنازع کے مرکز میں ہے۔ ایک بڑے فوجی آپریشن کے آغاز کے بعد، ملک نے اس نازک وقت میں نئے رہنما کے تقرر کا اعلان کیا ہے۔

ur-roman.title: Barhtay Hue Tanazay Ke Darmiyan Iran Mein Naye Rehnuma Ka Taqarrur
ur-roman.excerpt: Pichlay kuch dino mein Iran aik shadeed tanazay ke markaz mein hai...
ur-roman.content: Pichlay kuch dino mein Iran aik shadeed tanazay ke markaz mein hai. Aik baray fouji operation ke aghaz ke baad, mulk ne is nazuk waqt mein naye rehnuma ke taqarrur ka elaan kiya hai.

en.title: Bermuda Triangle
en.excerpt: Ships and planes vanish without a trace in this mysterious region.
en.content: The Bermuda Triangle, also known as the Devil's Triangle, is a loosely defined region in the western part of the North Atlantic Ocean where a number of aircraft and ships are said to have disappeared under mysterious circumstances.

ur.title: برمودا مثلث
ur.excerpt: اس پراسرار خطے میں بحری جہاز اور ہوائی جہاز بغیر نشان کے غائب ہو جاتے ہیں۔
ur.content: برمودا مثلث، جسے شیطان کا مثلث بھی کہا جاتا ہے، شمالی بحر اوقیانوس کے مغربی حصے میں ایک خطہ ہے جہاں متعدد طیارے اور بحری جہاز پراسرار حالات میں غائب ہو گئے ہیں۔

ur-roman.title: Bermuda Maslas
ur-roman.excerpt: Is pur-asrar khatay mein behri jahaz aur hawai jahaz baghair nishan ke gayab ho jate hain.
ur-roman.content: Bermuda maslas, jise shaitan ka maslas bhi kaha jata hai, shumali behar-o-qiyanus ke maghribi hissay mein aik khatta hai jahan mutadid tayyaray aur behri jahaz pur-asrar halat mein gayab ho gaye hain.

en.title: Area 51
en.excerpt: The secretive military base at the center of UFO conspiracy theories.
en.content: Area 51 is a highly classified United States Air Force facility within the Nevada Test and Training Range. The intense secrecy surrounding the base has made it the frequent subject of conspiracy theories.

ur.title: ایریا 51
ur.excerpt: خفیہ فوجی اڈہ جو UFO سازشی نظریات کا مرکز ہے۔
ur.content: ایریا 51 نیواڈا ٹیسٹ اور ٹریننگ رینج کے اندر ایک انتہائی خفیہ امریکی فضائیہ کی سہولت ہے۔ اڈے کے ارد گرد شدید رازداری نے اسے سازشی نظریات کا اکثر موضوع بنا دیا ہے۔

ur-roman.title: Area 51
ur-roman.excerpt: Khufiya fouji adda jo UFO sazshi nazriyat ka markaz hai.
ur-roman.content: Area 51 Nevada Test aur Training Range ke andar aik intehai khufiya American fouji saholat hai. Adday ke ird gird shadeed raazdari ne isay sazshi nazriyat ka aksar mawzoo bana diya hai.

en.title: Roswell Incident
en.excerpt: The 1947 crash that sparked modern UFO culture.
en.content: The Roswell incident was the recovery of material from a balloon crash in 1947 near Roswell, New Mexico. The U.S. military stated it was a weather balloon, but conspiracy theorists believe it was a crashed extraterrestrial spacecraft.

ur.title: روزویل واقعہ
ur.excerpt: 1947 کا حادثہ جس نے جدید UFO ثقافت کو جنم دیا۔
ur.content: روزویل واقعہ 1947 میں نیو میکسیکو کے روزویل کے قریب ایک غبارے کے حادثے سے مواد کی بازیافت تھی۔ امریکی فوج نے کہا کہ یہ موسم کا غبارہ تھا، لیکن سازشی نظریہ دانوں کا خیال ہے کہ یہ ایک گرایا ہوا ماورائے ارضی خلائی جہاز تھا۔

ur-roman.title: Roswell Waqea
ur-roman.excerpt: 1947 ka hadsa jis ne jadeed UFO saqafat ko janam diya.
ur-roman.content: Roswell waqea 1947 mein New Mexico ke Roswell ke qareeb aik ghumbaray ke hadsay se mawad ki bazyaft thi. American fouji ne kaha ke ye mausam ka ghumbara tha, lekin sazshi nazriya danon ka khayal hai ke ye aik giraya hua mawara-e-ardi khalaee jahaz tha.

encyclopedia.title: Great Pyramid of Giza
encyclopedia.description: The oldest and largest of the three pyramids in the Giza pyramid complex. Built around 2560 BC, it was the tallest man-made structure for over 3,800 years.

encyclopedia.title: Vajont Dam
encyclopedia.description: A dam in Italy that caused a massive landslide and tsunami in 1963, resulting in nearly 2,000 deaths. One of the worst man-made disasters in history.

encyclopedia.title: MH370
encyclopedia.description: Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 disappeared on March 8, 2014, with 239 people on board. The aircraft remains missing to this day.

encyclopedia.title: Bermuda Triangle
encyclopedia.description: A region in the western part of the North Atlantic Ocean where aircraft and ships are said to have disappeared under mysterious circumstances.

encyclopedia.title: Area 51
encyclopedia.description: A highly classified United States Air Force facility in Nevada, often associated with UFO and alien conspiracy theories.

encyclopedia.title: Roswell Incident
encyclopedia.description: The 1947 recovery of metallic and rubber debris from a balloon crash near Roswell, New Mexico, sparking UFO conspiracy theories.

encyclopedia.title: Stonehenge
encyclopedia.description: A prehistoric monument in England consisting of a ring of standing stones. Its construction date is estimated between 3000 BC and 2000 BC.

encyclopedia.title: Nazca Lines
encyclopedia.description: A group of geoglyphs in the Nazca Desert of Peru, created between 500 BC and 500 AD. Their purpose remains unknown.

encyclopedia.title: Easter Island Moai
encyclopedia.description: Monolithic statues carved by the Rapa Nui people on Easter Island between 1250 and 1500 CE.

encyclopedia.title: Atlantis
encyclopedia.description: A legendary island first mentioned by Plato. The story of its disappearance has fascinated historians for centuries.

encyclopedia.title: Loch Ness Monster
encyclopedia.description: A cryptid said to inhabit Loch Ness in Scotland. First reported in 1933, it remains one of the most famous mysteries.

encyclopedia.title: Bigfoot
encyclopedia.description: An ape-like creature said to inhabit forests of North America. Also known as Sasquatch.

encyclopedia.title: Yeti
encyclopedia.description: An ape-like creature said to inhabit the Himalayan mountains of Nepal and Tibet.

encyclopedia.title: Chupacabra
encyclopedia.description: A legendary creature in Latin American folklore that attacks livestock, especially goats.

encyclopedia.title: Jersey Devil
encyclopedia.description: A legendary creature said to inhabit the Pine Barrens of New Jersey, first reported in 1735.

encyclopedia.title: Mothman
encyclopedia.description: A humanoid creature reportedly seen in Point Pleasant, West Virginia, during 1966-1967.

encyclopedia.title: Crop Circles
encyclopedia.description: Patterns created by flattening crops, first widely reported in the 1970s. Their origin remains debated.

encyclopedia.title: UFO Sightings
encyclopedia.description: Reports of unidentified flying objects have been documented throughout history, with increased frequency since 1947.

encyclopedia.title: Alien Abductions
encyclopedia.description: Claims of people being kidnapped by extraterrestrial beings, popularized in the 1960s.

encyclopedia.title: Ancient Astronauts
encyclopedia.description: Theory suggesting that extraterrestrials visited Earth in ancient times and influenced human civilization.

encyclopedia.title: Pyramid Power
encyclopedia.description: Pseudoscientific theory claiming pyramids have supernatural powers and can preserve food, sharpen blades, etc.

encyclopedia.title: Crystal Skulls
encyclopedia.description: Carved skulls made of quartz crystal, claimed to be pre-Columbian Mesoamerican artifacts but mostly proven to be modern creations.

encyclopedia.title: Oak Island Money Pit
encyclopedia.description: A pit on Oak Island, Nova Scotia, that has been excavated since 1795 with claims of hidden treasure.

encyclopedia.title: Tunguska Event
encyclopedia.description: A massive explosion in Siberia in 1908, believed to be caused by an air burst of a meteoroid.

encyclopedia.title: Philadelphia Experiment
encyclopedia.description: An alleged naval experiment in 1943 that supposedly made the USS Eldridge invisible and teleported it.

encyclopedia.title: Montauk Project
encyclopedia.description: Conspiracy theory about secret government experiments at Camp Hero in Montauk, New York.

encyclopedia.title: Denver Airport Conspiracy
encyclopedia.description: Theories about hidden bunkers, underground tunnels, and secret societies at Denver International Airport.

encyclopedia.title: Hollow Earth
encyclopedia.description: The hypothesis that planet Earth is hollow and contains an inner world.

encyclopedia.title: Flat Earth Theory
encyclopedia.description: The belief that Earth is flat, despite overwhelming scientific evidence to the contrary.

encyclopedia.title: Chemtrails
encyclopedia.description: Conspiracy theory claiming that condensation trails left by aircraft are actually chemical or biological agents.

encyclopedia.title: New World Order
encyclopedia.description: Conspiracy theory about a powerful elite group plotting to establish global totalitarian rule.

encyclopedia.title: Illuminati
encyclopedia.description: Secret society first founded in 1776, now central to many conspiracy theories about world control.

encyclopedia.title: Freemasons
encyclopedia.description: Fraternal organization founded in the 14th century, often associated with conspiracy theories.

encyclopedia.title: Skull and Bones
encyclopedia.description: Secret society at Yale University, known for its powerful alumni including two U.S. presidents.

encyclopedia.title: Bohemian Grove
encyclopedia.description: Exclusive retreat for wealthy and powerful men in California, subject of numerous conspiracy theories.

questions.question: What year did Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 disappear?

Where was MH370's last known position?
questions.explanation: Last known position was over the Indian Ocean.

questions.question: What is the most controversial theory about MH370?
questions.explanation: The pilot suicide theory is among the most discussed.
